meta.title: The scary truth about flying the SR-71 (and why we shouldn't forget)
meta.description:
The SR-71 Blackbird is one aircraft that practically needs no introduction. This high-flying spy plane is known the world over for its ability to scream across the sky at better than Mach 3. And truth is, the Habu, as its pilots knew it, really was the engineering marvel it's so often credited for being.

But that's not the whole story... and we shouldn't forget about the struggles, crashes, and tragedies that it took to get there.
